infoSections.title: Our values
infoSections.content: We believe in quality materials, fair pricing, and honest descriptions. Every item is chosen to last beyond a single season.

infoSections.title: Shipping
infoSections.content: We ship worldwide. Standard delivery is 5–7 business days; express options are available at checkout.

infoSections.title: Returns
infoSections.content: Changed your mind? Unused items in original packaging can be returned within 30 days for a full refund.
